menu.activePathHelp:
Menu path to activate when jumping to the current route.
Specify the active path if not displayed in the navigation menu
menu.activePathMustExist: No valid menu found for this path
menu.affixTabHelp: Configure whether the page is pinned to the tab bar; pinned pages cannot be closed
menu.orderHelp: Menu sort, ascending.  Note: Sorting is only valid for Level 1 menus. The sorting of Level 2 menus needs to be set according to the code order in the corresponding Level 1 menu.
menu.maxNumOfOpenTabHelp: Maximum number of open tabs (only valid for tabs with the same name)
menu.affixTabOrderHelp: Sort order for pinned tabs, ascending
menu.noBasicLayoutHelp: Configure current route not to use basic layout, only valid at top level. By default, all routes are wrapped in basic layout (including top and sidebar navigation)
menu.openInNewWindowHelp: Configure whether to open current route in a new window
menu.domCachedHelp: Configure whether to cache the DOM element for the route. For complex pages, switching tabs may cause lag due to browser reflow/repaint. Setting domCached to true fixes this, but costs: 1. Higher memory usage 2. Some Vue lifecycles not triggered
menu.hideChildrenInMenuHelp: Configure whether child pages are hidden in the menu
menu.hideInBreadcrumbHelp: Configure whether the page is hidden in breadcrumb
menu.hideInMenuHelp: Configure whether the page is hidden in the menu
menu.hideInTabHelp: Configure whether the page is hidden in the tab bar
menu.keepAliveHelp: Valid only when tabs are enabled.  For example, when the current menu is selected for the second time.  Nor does it trigger the lifecycle of the page onMounted
menu.menuNameHelp: Menu name, corresponding to the name field in the route, for example: 'SystemRole'
menu.menuTitleHelp: You can use an international configuration, such as 'system.menu.menuTitle', or you can enter the title directly
menu.name: Menu
menu.title: Menu Management
